blocked_reasons: qwen3_5_moe_text uses linear_attention/full_attention layer_types and a full_attention_interval; current qwen3_moe wrapper assumes Qwen3MoeDecoderLayer standard attention/cache behavior.
No BloomBee model package or auto_config/from_pretrained registration exists for model_type=qwen3_5_moe or qwen3_5_moe_text.
Top-level architecture is Qwen3_5MoeForConditionalGeneration with vision/image/video config fields; the BloomBee wrapper boundary must choose and test the text-tower-only path explicitly.
Proof status is prescan=passed but all serving/generation/load gates are blocked-by-wrapper.
No BloomBee block wrapper registered for model_type=qwen3_5_moe

do_not_claim: Do not treat AgentWorld-35B as a Qwen3-30B drop-in replacement.
Do not mark architecture_supported=true until a qwen3_5_moe wrapper and tests exist.
Do not run one-block/full/cache/load proof until the wrapper import/config layer is green.
minimal_next_proof: Write RED import/config-dispatch tests for qwen3_5_moe and qwen3_5_moe_text without loading weights.
Prototype a tiny qwen3_5_moe text config only if transformers exposes stable Qwen3_5Moe text/block classes locally.
Add one-block server proof only after wrapper tests prove attention/cache semantics on a tiny fixture.
research_question: Can AgentWorld-35B-A3B reuse the current qwen3_moe BloomBee wrapper, or does it need a distinct qwen3_5_moe/text-tower wrapper before any proof gate?

scan_method.scope: config-only scout; no weights downloaded for this artifact; no wrapper code written; no live server proof

why_existing_qwen3_moe_wrapper_is_insuff: Current src/bloombee/models/qwen3_moe wraps transformers Qwen3MoeDecoderLayer with standard Qwen3-MoE attention/cache assumptions. AgentWorld config uses qwen3_5_moe/qwen3_5_moe_text plus alternating linear_attention/full_attention layers, mRoPE parameters, and linear-attention head fields, so copying WrappedQwen3MoeBlock would not prove the attention/cache contract.
